'''鈭歵-v-y-zh''' ('''katavyezhoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:locarnize|locarnize]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| t-v-y-zh
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:locarnize|locarnize]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歵-v-y-zh
|-
! Lemma
| katavyezhoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thitavyezhoko|thitavyezhoko]] || [[word:jitavyezhoko|jitavyezhoko]] || [[word:shitavyezhoko|shitavyezhoko]] || [[word:kitavyezhoko|kitavyezhoko]]
|-

|-
